title: The Noob Mod Reloaded
description: this mod adds dirt items and tools this is the remaster of my first mod
body:
# The Noob Mod Reloaded

### Links

[My Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@mr_bob1234?_t=ZS-8tIPFZfiBij&_r=1)

[My Discord Server](https://discord.gg/DJZs2zrSmR)

Feel Free To Talk About Anything In The Server

### What Does This Mod Add?
The Noob Mod Adds **Tools/Blocks**
### Examples Of Stuff In The Mod
Tier 1 **Dirt Tools**
